name: NEXT Biometrics Group ASA
summary: NEXT Biometrics Group ASA, through its subsidiaries, engages in the research, development, manufacture, and commercialization of fingerprint technology and products in Asia. The company offers fingerprint sensor modules and readers, and flexible biometric subassemblies, as well as software and hardware development kits for USB and SPI modules. Its products are used in smart card, government ID, access control, and notebook applications. The company sells its sensors to distributors of electronic components. NEXT Biometrics Group ASA is headquartered in Oslo, Norway.
